mission.title: contour: Support adding / removing headers
mission.description: Support adding / removing headers. Requested by 12+ users.

steps.title: Check current contour deployment
steps.description:
Verify your contour version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour
helm list -n projectcontour 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working contour installation.

steps.title: Review contour configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant contour configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour
kubectl get configmap -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=contour
```
Add support for adding / removing headers at the Ingress, namespace, and default level

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support adding / removing headers
steps.description:
Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:
```yaml
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: example
  annotations:
    contour.heptio.com/response-headers-to-add: |
      Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
      Public-Key-Pins: max-age=2592000; pin-sha256="E9CZ9INDbd+2eRQozYqqbQ2yXLVKB9+xcprMF+44U1g="
    contour.heptio.com/response-headers-to-remove: |
      X-Powered-By
spec:
  ...
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour
kubectl get events -n projectcontour --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support adding / removing headers" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/projectcontour/contour/pull/407
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: example
  annotations:
    contour.heptio.com/response-headers-to-add: |
      Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
      Public-Key-Pins: max-age=2592000; pin-sha256="E9CZ9INDbd+2eRQozYqqbQ2yXLVKB9+xcprMF+44U1g="
    contour.heptio.com/response-headers-to-remove: |
      X-Powered-By
spec:
  ...

spec:
  routes:
    prefix: /foo
      headers:
        add:
        - name: "x-request-id"
           value: "fixed value"
        - name: "x-something"
           value: "another fixed value"
       remove:
       - name: "Date"
       - name: "ETag"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with contour installed or the issue environment reproducible.
